title: libnbd bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.22.2-2]
- Rebase to libnbd 1.22.2
- Synch spec file with Fedora Rawhide.
  resolves: RHEL-78831
- Fix nbdinfo with dark theme
  resolves: RHEL-7119
- Add nbdcopy --blkhash option
  resolves: RHEL-85513
- Log the version of libnbd / nbdcopy in virt-v2v output
  resolves: RHEL-104019
full_text:
[1.22.2-2]
- Rebase to libnbd 1.22.2
- Synch spec file with Fedora Rawhide.
  resolves: RHEL-78831
- Fix nbdinfo with dark theme
  resolves: RHEL-7119
- Add nbdcopy --blkhash option
  resolves: RHEL-85513
- Log the version of libnbd / nbdcopy in virt-v2v output
  resolves: RHEL-104019

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20338-0.html
